description: Every Sutra (Arketa) Partner API resource, plus a local data mirror and the studio analytics the dashboard buries — no-show rates, capacity, churn, and revenue you can finally query.

tools.name: classes_get-partner
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of partner classes with optional filtering. Required: partnerId, locationId. Optional: limit (default: 10), start_after, start_date (plus 2 more). Returns array of Class.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of items to return (default 10, max 100)

params.name: start_after
params.description: ID to start after for pagination

params.name: start_date
params.description: Filter classes starting from this date (ISO 8601)

params.name: end_date
params.description: Filter classes ending before this date (ISO 8601)

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of IDs to fetch

tools.name: classes_get-partner-class
tools.description: Retrieve details for a specific class. Required: partnerId, classId. Returns the ClassesGetPartnerClassResponse.

tools.name: classes_reservations_cancel
tools.description: Cancel an existing reservation with optional refund. Required: partnerId, classId, reservationId. Optional: isLateCancel (default: false), issueRefund (default: false). Returns the updated ReservationsCancelResponse.

params.name: isLateCancel
params.description: Whether this is a late cancellation

tools.name: classes_reservations_check-in
tools.description: Mark a reservation as checked in. Required: partnerId, classId, reservationId. Returns the new ReservationsCheckInResponse.

tools.name: classes_reservations_create
tools.description: Create a reservation for a class with either an existing client or new client. Required: partnerId, classId. Returns the new ReservationsCreateResponse.

tools.name: classes_reservations_get-class
tools.description: Retrieve reservations for a specific class. Required: partnerId, classId. Optional: limit (default: 10), start_after. Returns array of Reservation.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of items to return (default 10, max 100)

params.name: start_after
params.description: ID to start after for pagination

tools.name: clients_get-partner
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of partner clients with optional filtering. Required: partnerId. Optional: limit (default: 10), start_after, updated_at_min (plus 2 more). Returns array of Client.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of items to return (default 10, max 100)

params.name: start_after
params.description: ID to start after for pagination

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of IDs to fetch

tools.name: clients_get-partner-clients
tools.description: Retrieve details for a specific client. Required: partnerId, clientId. Returns the ClientsGetPartnerClientsResponse.

tools.name: locations_get-partner
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of partner locations with optional filtering. Required: partnerId. Optional: limit (default: 10), start_after, updated_at_min (plus 2 more). Returns array of Location.

params.name: start_after

params.name: ids

tools.name: locations_rooms_get-location
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of rooms for a specific location. Required: partnerId, locationId. Optional: limit (default: 10), start_after, updated_at_min (plus 2 more). Returns array of Room.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of items to return (default 10, max 100)

params.name: start_after
